inUse.title: MCP servers in use
inUse.subtitle: Browse, enable, and remove MCP servers across your harnesses.
inUse.errorDescription: Try refreshing the local data, or select another option in the sidebar.
inUse.emptyTitle: No MCP servers in use yet
inUse.emptyDescription: Install one from the marketplace, or adopt an existing entry from a harness config.
inUse.noMatchesDescription: Adjust the search or filter to see other MCP servers.
inUse.viewModeLabel: MCP servers in use view mode
inUse.uninstallConfirmDescription: This action cannot be undone. The selected MCP servers will be permanently removed.
inUse.uninstallBulkDescription: Remove each server from the Skill Manager catalog and delete its bindings from all harnesses where it is currently present.
inUse.uninstallSingleDescription: Remove this server from the Skill Manager catalog and delete its bindings from all harnesses where it is currently present.
inUse.inventoryIssue: {{count}} MCP catalog record could not be loaded. Valid records are still shown.
inUse.inventoryIssue_plural: {{count}} MCP catalog records could not be loaded. Valid records are still shown.

needsReview.title: MCP configs to review
needsReview.subtitle: {{count}} MCP configuration needs a review decision.
needsReview.subtitle_plural: {{count}} MCP configurations need a review decision.
needsReview.subtitleEmpty: No local MCP config entries need review across your harnesses.
needsReview.emptyTitle: No local MCP configs need review
needsReview.emptyDescription: Your harness configs only reference MCP servers that skill-manager already tracks. Install a new server from the marketplace to add more.
needsReview.noMatchesDescription: Clear the search to see all MCP configs that need review.

detail.chooseConfig: Choose which config to treat as the source of truth.
detail.manageConfigDescription: Choose which config Skill Manager should manage, then apply it to current bindings.
detail.detailSheetDescription: Inspect and manage an installed MCP server.

configChoice.title: Choose config to adopt
configChoice.descriptionChoose: Pick the config to store as the Skill Manager config. Other harness entries will be rewritten to match it.
configChoice.descriptionApply: Pick the config Skill Manager should manage. Current bindings will be rewritten to match it.
configChoice.adoptTooltip: Add to Skill Manager using the selected config
configChoice.applyTooltip: Apply the selected config to current bindings

errors.toggleFailed: Unable to toggle the MCP server.
errors.actionFailed: Unable to complete the requested action.
errors.bulkFailed: Unable to manage all MCP servers.
errors.someHarnessesNotUpdated: Some harnesses could not be updated
